repo_signals: rename a React component and update its prop types

retrieval_query: flink kafka streams windowing tumbling sliding watermark out of order exactly once stateful checkpoint backpressure

validation_smoke.name: code.streaming L3 validation smoke
signals: a window emits on event-time watermark advance and tolerates bounded out-of-order events
a forced operator restart recovers from a checkpoint without duplicating or losing output
backpressure surfaces as a measurable signal rather than silent unbounded buffering

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.streaming diagnosis smoke
signals: windows never fire because the watermark stalls behind an idle or lagging partition
output is duplicated after recovery because a sink is not idempotent or transactional
